title: Bali Catamaran Charter Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
Chartering a catamaran in Bali offers an unmatched way to explore the island's coastline from Benoa Harbour to the offshore islets, with full-day crewed rates starting from around 8,000,000 IDR. BoatHire24 connects you directly with verified owners for a seamless booking experience.

How much does it cost to rent a catamaran in Bali?

A crewed catamaran for a full day typically costs between 8,000,000 and 15,000,000 IDR, depending on size and season. Prices rise by 20, 30% during peak months of July, August, and December. For a 43-foot Leopard like the Shashani, the advertised rate often includes skipper, fuel, and basic refreshments. Week-long charters or bookings via day charters in Bali can sometimes secure a better per-day rate if you book ahead.

Where to set off in Bali

Most catamaran charters depart from Benoa Harbour, the island's main marina with full facilities. Other common departure points include Serangan Island just south of Sanur, and Padang Bai in the east for faster access to the offshore islands. Amed Bay and Lovina in the north are quieter alternatives, often used for private charters to Menjangan Island. Each location offers different scenery and proximity to reefs, so choose based on your itinerary.

Which boat to rent

Your choice of catamaran affects the feel of the day. Here are popular options:

  1. Leopard 43 (e.g., Shashani), ideal for groups of up to ten guests; spacious saloon and foredeck trampolines. From 10,000,000 IDR per day.
  2. Lagoon 450, four-cabin layout suits up to twelve guests; stable sailing and good galley. From 14,000,000 IDR per day.
  3. Bali 4.5, modern flybridge design for up to twelve guests; best for luxury sunset cruises. From 15,000,000 IDR per day.
  4. Fountaine Pajot Lucia 40, comfortable for eight guests; ideal for family trips with shorter sails to nearby islands. From 9,000,000 IDR per day.

For detailed specs and availability, check the Shashani charter page on BoatHire24, which lists real-time pricing and skipper details.

Cost breakdown for boat rentals in Bali

Boat hire options span a wide range. Here is a typical price band breakdown:

  • Shared tour (traditional outrigger): from 500,000 IDR per person.
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 6 guests): from 1,500,000 IDR.
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests, crewed): from 8,000,000 IDR.
  • Crewed luxury yacht (up to 20 guests, all inclusive): from 20,000,000 IDR.

Fuel and park fees are sometimes extra; ask the operator before confirming.

When to go and do you need a licence?

The best season for catamaran charter in Bali runs from April to October, with dry weather and steady south-east trade winds. The wet season (November to March) brings higher humidity and afternoon showers, but still has many calm days. For licence requirements, the general principle is that you do not need a licence if you hire a crewed boat, but for bareboat rentals you must hold an appropriate certificate; the operator confirms exact requirements at booking.

Book a morning departure in July to catch the south-east wind, which reaches 10-15 knots by midday, perfect for sailing past Nusa Dua and out to Nusa Lembongan, about 17 nautical miles from Benoa.

At a glance

  • Price range: 8,000,000, 15,000,000 IDR per day for crewed catamaran
  • Peak months: July, August, December
  • Trip length: typically 4, 8 hours, half or full day
  • Capacity: 6, 12 guests on a standard catamaran
  • Currency: Indonesian Rupiah (IDR)

Questions about boat rental in Bali

Can I rent a catamaran without a skipper?

Some owners allow bareboat hire for qualified sailors, but most catamarans on BoatHire24 include a skipper.

What is included in the price?

Standard inclusions are skipper, fuel, water, ice, and sometimes snorkelling gear; food and drinks are often extra.

How far in advance should I book for 2026?

For peak season (July and August), booking three to six months ahead is wise to secure your preferred vessel.

Can I charter a catamaran for a single night?

Some operators offer overnight charters to Nusa Penida or Gili Islands, typically starting from 15,000,000 IDR for two days.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Bali or list your own. If you own a catamaran here, you can become a host and earn income from your boat during 2026.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Bali and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
